statements.__comment__: DEPRECATED: temporary backward-compatibility migration. Earlier versions scoped AWSPolicyStatement cleanup via STATEMENT (per-policy); the schema now uses RESOURCE from AWSAccount as the sub_resource. Backfill the RESOURCE edge for every existing statement reachable from the currently-syncing AWSAccount via its policies. Scoped by $AWS_ID so multi-account refreshes don't redo the full graph each time. Idempotent (MERGE). Remove in v1.0.0.
statements.query: MATCH (a:AWSAccount {id: $AWS_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(p:AWSPolicy)-[:STATEMENT]->(s:AWSPolicyStatement) MERGE (a)-[r:RESOURCE]->(s) ON CREATE SET r.lastupdated = s.lastupdated
